Name: ContainerCgroupVersion
Description: Cgroup version (1 or 2)

Name: ContainerId
Description: Container ID

Name: ContainerNumProcessors
Description: Number of CPU processors

Name: uuid
Description: Unique identifier for this profiling session

Name: Nvidia*ClocksMaxGraphics
Description: The maximum graphics clock speed for the device in MHz.

Name: Nvidia*ClocksMaxMemory
Description: The maximum memory clock speed for the device in MHz.

Name: Nvidia*ClocksMaxSM
Description: The maximum SM clock speed for the device in MHz.

Name: Nvidia*DeviceComputeCapabilityMajor
Description: The major CUDA compute capability version number of the device.

Name: Nvidia*DeviceComputeCapabilityMinor
Description: The minor CUDA compute capability version number of the device.

Name: Nvidia*DeviceCudaVersion
Description: The CUDA driver version.

Name: Nvidia*DeviceDriverVersion
Description: The version of the system's graphics driver.

Name: Nvidia*DeviceIndex
Description: GPU device index

Name: Nvidia*DeviceName
Description: The name of this device. The name is an alphanumeric string that denotes a particular product, e.g. Tesla C2070. It will not exceed 96 characters in length (including the NULL terminator).

Name: Nvidia*DeviceSerial
Description: The globally unique board serial number associated with this device's board. The serial number is an alphanumeric string that will not exceed 30 characters (including the NULL terminator). This number matches the serial number tag that is physically attached to the board.

Name: Nvidia*DeviceUUID
Description: The globally unique immutable UUID associated with this device, as a 5 part hexadecimal string, that augments the immutable, board serial identifier.

Name: Nvidia*MemoryBar1Total
Description: Total BAR1 memory available in bytes. BAR1 is used to map the FB (device memory) so that it can be directly accessed by the CPU or by 3rd party devices (peer-to-peer on the PCIE bus).

Name: Nvidia*MemoryTotal
Description: Total installed GPU memory in bytes.

Name: Nvidia*PCIeBusID
Description: The PCI bus id as "domain:bus:device.function".

Name: Nvidia*PCIeLinkGen
Description: The current PCIe link generation.

Name: Nvidia*PCIeLinkWidth
Description: The current PCIe link width.

Name: Nvidia*PCIeMaxLinkGen
Description: The maximum PCIe link generation possible with this device and system. I.E. for a generation 2 PCIe device attached to a generation 1 PCIe bus the max link generation this function will report is generation 1.

Name: Nvidia*PCIeMaxLinkWidth
Description: The maximum PCIe link width possible with this device and system. I.E. for a device with a 16x PCIe bus width attached to a 8x PCIe system bus this function will report a max link width of 8.

Name: Nvidia*PowerDefaultLimit
Description: Default power management limit on this device, in milliwatts. Default power management limit is a power management limit that the device boots with.

Name: Nvidia*PowerEnforcedLimit
Description: The effective power limit that the driver enforces after taking into account all limiters. Note: This can be different from the nvmlDeviceGetPowerManagementLimit if other limits are set elsewhere. This includes the out of band power limit interface.

Name: Nvidia*PowerLimit
Description: The power management limit associated with this device. The power limit defines the upper boundary for the card's power draw. If the card's total power draw reaches this limit the power management algorithm kicks in.

Name: Nvidia*PowerMaxLimit
Description: Maximum power management limit in milliwatts.

Name: Nvidia*PowerMinLimit
Description: Minimum power management limit in milliwatts.

Name: Nvidia*ThermalMaxOperating
Description: The temperature threshold for the GPU with threshold type NVML_TEMPERATURE_THRESHOLD_GPU_MAX in degrees C.

Name: Nvidia*ThermalShutdownThreshold
Description: The temperature threshold for the GPU with threshold type NVML_TEMPERATURE_THRESHOLD_SHUTDOWN in degrees C.

Name: Nvidia*ThermalSlowdownThreshold
Description: The temperature threshold for the GPU with threshold type NVML_TEMPERATURE_THRESHOLD_SLOWDOWN in degrees C.

Name: VmCpuCache
Description: CPU cache configuration as a JSON object (e.g., {"L1d":"32K","L1i":"32K","L2":"256K","L3":"8M"}).

Name: VmCpuHostName
Description: Hostname of the machine. Inside Docker this returns the container hostname.

Name: VmCpuKernelInfo
Description: Kernel version and system information as a JSON object with keys: Sysname, Nodename, Release, Version, Machine.
Source: syscall.Uname() → JSON {Sysname, Nodename, Release, Version, Machine}

Name: VmCpuNTPInfo
Description: NTP synchronization status as a JSON object from querying pool.ntp.org via Go NTP library. Includes ClockOffset, RTT, Precision, Stratum, ReferenceID, ReferenceTime, RootDelay, RootDispersion, RootDistance, Leap, MinError, KissCode, Poll.
Source: ntp.Query("pool.ntp.org") → JSON {Status, ClockOffset, Time, RTT, Precision, Stratum, ...}

Name: VmCpuNumProcessors
Description: Number of CPU processors

Name: VmCpuType
Description: The model name of the processor

Name: VmDiskDrives*Model
Description: Disk model name

Name: VmDiskDrives*Name
Description: Disk device name (e.g., sda, nvme0n1)

Name: VmDiskDrives*Rotational
Description: True if rotational (HDD), False if SSD

Name: VmDiskDrives*Sectors
Description: Total number of 512-byte sectors on the disk (multiply by 512 to get bytes)

Name: VmMemSwapTotalStatic
Description: Total swap space in kilobytes (KB). Collected once at startup.

Name: VmMemTotalStatic
Description: Total amount of usable RAM in kilobytes (KB). Collected once at startup.

Name: VmNetnetworkInterfaces*mac
Description: MAC address

Name: VmNetnetworkInterfaces*mtu
Description: Maximum transmission unit

Name: VmNetnetworkInterfaces*name
Description: Network interface name (e.g., eth0)

Name: VmNetnetworkInterfaces*speed
Description: Network interface speed

Name: ContainerCpuTime
Description: Total CPU time consumed by all tasks in this cgroup (including tasks lower in the hierarchy). V1: nanoseconds from cpuacct.usage. V2: microseconds from cpu.stat usage_usec.

Name: ContainerCpuTimeKernelMode
Description: CPU time consumed by tasks in kernel mode in this cgroup. V1: centiseconds from cpuacct.stat. V2: microseconds from cpu.stat system_usec.

Name: ContainerCpuTimeUserMode
Description: CPU time consumed by tasks in user mode in this cgroup. V1: centiseconds from cpuacct.stat. V2: microseconds from cpu.stat user_usec.

Name: ContainerDiskReadBytes
Description: Number of bytes transferred from specific devices by a cgroup in bytes

Name: ContainerDiskSectorIO
Description: Number of sectors transferred to or from specific devices by a cgroup. Only collected in cgroups v1; zero in v2.

Name: ContainerDiskWriteBytes
Description: Number of bytes transferred to specific devices by a cgroup in bytes

Name: ContainerMajorPgFault
Description: Major page faults in the cgroup

Name: ContainerMemoryMaxUsed
Description: Maximum memory used by processes in the cgroup in bytes

Name: ContainerMemoryUsed
Description: Total current memory usage by processes in the cgroup in bytes

Name: ContainerNetworkBytesRecvd
Description: The number of bytes each interface has received

Name: ContainerNetworkBytesSent
Description: The number of bytes each interface has sent

Name: ContainerPgFault
Description: Page faults in the cgroup

Name: ContainerProcessCount
Description: Number of processes inside a container

Name: timestamp/*T
Description: Timestamp when metrics were collected (applies to per metrics timestamps as well *T)

Name: Nvidia*ClocksGraphics
Description: The current clock speed for the graphics clock domain in MHz.

Name: Nvidia*ClocksMemory
Description: The current clock speed for the memory clock domain in MHz.

Name: Nvidia*ClocksPState
Description: The current performance state for the device. States range from P0 (maximum performance) to P15 (minimum performance).

Name: Nvidia*ClocksSM
Description: The current clock speed for the SM clock domain in MHz.

Name: Nvidia*ClocksThrottleReasons
Description: Current clocks event reasons. More than one bit can be enabled at the same time. Multiple reasons can be affecting clocks at once.

Name: Nvidia*ClocksVideo
Description: The current clock speed for the video clock domain in MHz.

Name: Nvidia*Index
Description: The NVML index of this device. Valid indices are derived from the accessibleDevices count returned by nvmlDeviceGetCount_v2().

Name: Nvidia*MemoryBar1Free
Description: Free BAR1 memory in bytes.

Name: Nvidia*MemoryBar1Used
Description: Used BAR1 memory in bytes. BAR1 is used to map the FB (device memory) so that it can be directly accessed by the CPU or by 3rd party devices (peer-to-peer on the PCIE bus).

Name: Nvidia*MemoryFree
Description: Free GPU memory in bytes.

Name: Nvidia*MemoryUsed
Description: Used GPU memory in bytes. Under Linux and Windows TCC, the reported amount of used memory is equal to the sum of memory allocated by all active channels on the device.

Name: Nvidia*PCIeReplayCounter
Description: The PCIe replay counter.

Name: Nvidia*PCIeRxThroughput
Description: PCIe receive throughput in KB/s over a 20ms sample window.

Name: Nvidia*PCIeTxThroughput
Description: PCIe transmit throughput in KB/s over a 20ms sample window.

Name: Nvidia*PowerEnergy
Description: Total energy consumption for this GPU in millijoules (mJ) since the driver was last reloaded.

Name: Nvidia*PowerUsage
Description: Power usage for this GPU in milliwatts and its associated circuitry (e.g. memory). On Fermi and Kepler GPUs the reading is accurate to within +/- 5% of current power draw. On Ampere (except GA100) or newer GPUs, the API returns power averaged over 1 sec interval. On GA100 and older architectures, instantaneous power is returned.

Name: Nvidia*ProcessesCount
Description: Number of processes with a compute or graphics context on the device.

Name: Nvidia*ProcessesList*Decoder
Description: Decoder utilization percentage for this process.

Name: Nvidia*ProcessesList*Encoder
Description: Encoder utilization percentage for this process.

Name: Nvidia*ProcessesList*MemUtil
Description: Memory utilization percentage for this process.

Name: Nvidia*ProcessesList*MemoryUsed
Description: GPU memory used by this process in bytes.

Name: Nvidia*ProcessesList*PID
Description: Process ID.

Name: Nvidia*ProcessesList*SM
Description: SM (streaming multiprocessor) utilization percentage for this process.

Name: Nvidia*ProcessesList*T
Description: Timestamp of the utilization sample for this process in microseconds.

Name: Nvidia*ProcessesList*Type
Description: Process type: 'compute' for CUDA applications with active context (from nvmlDeviceGetComputeRunningProcesses), 'graphics' for applications using OpenGL/DirectX (from nvmlDeviceGetGraphicsRunningProcesses), or 'mps' for Multi-Process Service compute processes (from nvmlDeviceGetMPSComputeRunningProcesses).

Name: Nvidia*ProcessesTimestamp
Description: Last sample timestamp used for process utilization queries in microseconds.

Name: Nvidia*ThermalGPU
Description: The current temperature readings for the device in degrees C for the GPU temperature sensor.

Name: Nvidia*UtilizationGPU
Description: Percent of time over the past sample period during which one or more kernels was executing on the GPU. The sample period may be between 1 second and 1/6 second depending on the product.

Name: Nvidia*UtilizationMemory
Description: Percent of time over the past sample period during which global (device) memory was being read or written. The sample period may be between 1 second and 1/6 second depending on the product.

Name: Nvidia*ViolationsPower
Description: The amount of time in nanoseconds that the device has been in a power violation state (throttling due to power constraints).

Name: Nvidia*ViolationsThermal
Description: The amount of time in nanoseconds that the device has been in a thermal violation state (throttling due to thermal constraints).

Name: Process*BlockIODelays
Description: Aggregated block I/O delays, measured in clock ticks

Name: Process*ChildrenKernelMode
Description: Total time children processes of the parent were scheduled in kernel mode, measured in clock ticks

Name: Process*ChildrenUserMode
Description: Total time children processes of the parent were scheduled in user mode, measured in clock ticks

Name: Process*CmdLine
Description: Process command line

Name: Process*CpuTimeKernelMode
Description: Total CPU time this process was scheduled in kernel mode, measured in clock ticks (divide by sysconf(_SC_CLK_TCK))

Name: Process*CpuTimeUserMode
Description: Total CPU time this process was scheduled in user mode, measured in clock ticks (divide by sysconf(_SC_CLK_TCK))

Name: Process*Id
Description: Process ID

Name: Process*Name
Description: Process name

Name: Process*NonvoluntaryContextSwitches
Description: Number of involuntary context switches

Name: Process*NumThreads
Description: Number of threads in this process

Name: Process*ResidentSetSize
Description: Resident Set Size: number of pages the process has in real memory. This is just the pages which count toward text, data, or stack space. This does not include pages which have not been demand-loaded in, or which are swapped out

Name: Process*VirtualMemoryBytes
Description: Virtual memory size in bytes

Name: Process*VoluntaryContextSwitches
Description: Number of voluntary context switches

Name: VllmAvailable
Description: Whether vLLM metrics are available

Name: VllmDecodeTimeHist
Description: Histogram of time spent in DECODE phase for request.

Name: VllmE2eLatencyHist
Description: Histogram of e2e request latency in seconds.

Name: VllmInferenceTimeHist
Description: Histogram of time spent in RUNNING phase for request.

Name: VllmInterTokenLatencyHist
Description: Histogram of inter-token latency in seconds.

Name: VllmPrefillTimeHist
Description: Histogram of time spent in PREFILL phase for request.

Name: VllmQueueTimeHist
Description: Histogram of time spent in WAITING phase for request.

Name: VllmTtftHist
Description: Histogram of time to first token in seconds.

Name: VllmGenerationTokensHist
Description: Number of generation tokens processed.

Name: VllmPromptTokensHist
Description: Number of prefill tokens processed.

Name: VllmTimePerOutputTokenHist
Description: Request duration normalized by output token count

Name: VllmKvCacheUsagePercent
Description: KV-cache usage. 1 means 100 percent usage.

Name: VllmNumPreemptionsTotal
Description: Cumulative number of preemption from the engine.

Name: VllmPrefixCacheHits
Description: Prefix cache hits, in terms of number of cached tokens.

Name: VllmPrefixCacheQueries
Description: Prefix cache queries, in terms of number of queried tokens.

Name: VllmNumRequestsRunning
Description: Number of requests in model execution batches.

Name: VllmNumRequestsWaiting
Description: Number of requests waiting to be processed.

Name: tokens
Description: Tokens emitted across all requests during this metric polling interval. Computed client-side from benchmark ITL timings binned to nearest metric sample.

Name: token_itl_sum_ms
Description: Total inter-token latency time accumulated across all tokens emitted in this interval. Analogous to CPU time for generation work.

Name: token_itl_max_ms
Description: Maximum inter-token latency observed across all tokens in this interval.

Name: token_itl_mean_ms
Description: Mean inter-token latency across all tokens in this interval.

Name: active_requests
Description: Number of distinct requests that emitted at least one token during this interval.

Name: token_ttft_sum_ms
Description: Total time-to-first-token accumulated across all requests whose first token landed in this interval.

Name: token_ttft_max_ms
Description: Maximum time-to-first-token observed across requests whose first token landed in this interval.

Name: token_ttft_mean_ms
Description: Mean time-to-first-token across requests whose first token landed in this interval.

Name: VmCpuContextSwitches
Description: The total number of context switches across all CPUs

Name: VmCpuIdleTime
Description: CPU idle time in centiseconds (cs)

Name: VmCpuLoadAvg
Description: The system load average as an average number of running plus waiting threads over the last minute

Name: VmCpuMhz
Description: CPU frequency in kilohertz (kHz). Raw value from scaling_cur_freq.

Name: VmCpuNice
Description: Time spent with niced processes executing in user mode in centiseconds (cs)

Name: VmCpuSteal
Description: Time stolen by other operating systems running in a virtual environment in centiseconds (cs)

Name: VmCpuTimeIOWait
Description: CPU time waiting for I/O to complete in centiseconds (cs)

Name: VmCpuTimeIntSrvc
Description: CPU time servicing interrupts in centiseconds (cs)

Name: VmCpuTimeKernelMode
Description: CPU time for processes executing in kernel mode in centiseconds (cs)

Name: VmCpuTimeSoftIntSrvc
Description: CPU time servicing soft interrupts in centiseconds (cs)

Name: VmCpuTimeUserMode
Description: CPU time for processes executing in user mode in centiseconds (cs)

Name: VmDiskIOInProgress
Description: Number of I/O operations currently in progress

Name: VmDiskIOTime
Description: Time spent doing I/O operations in milliseconds (ms)

Name: VmDiskMergedReads
Description: Number of disk reads merged together (adjacent and merged for efficiency)

Name: VmDiskMergedWrites
Description: Number of disk writes merged together (adjacent and merged for efficiency)

Name: VmDiskReadTime
Description: Time spent reading from the disk in milliseconds (ms)

Name: VmDiskSectorReads
Description: The number of disk sectors read, where a sector is typically 512 bytes. Aggregated across all matching disk devices (sd*, nvme*, vd*, xvd*, hd*).

Name: VmDiskSectorWrites
Description: The number of disk sectors written, where a sector is typically 512 bytes. Aggregated across all matching disk devices (sd*, nvme*, vd*, xvd*, hd*).

Name: VmDiskSuccessfulReads
Description: Number of disk reads completed succesfully

Name: VmDiskSuccessfulWrites
Description: Number of disk writes completed succesfully

Name: VmDiskWeightedIOTime
Description: Weighted time spent doing I/O (time * number of I/Os in progress) in milliseconds (ms)

Name: VmDiskWriteTime
Description: Time spent writing in milliseconds (ms)

Name: VmMemBuffers
Description: The amount of temporary storage for raw disk blocks in kilobytes (KB)

Name: VmMemCached
Description: The amount of physical RAM used as cache memory in kilobytes (KB)

Name: VmMemFree
Description: The amount of physical RAM left unused by the system in kilobytes (KB)

Name: VmMemMajorPageFault
Description: Major page faults are expected when a process starts or needs to read in additional data and in these cases do not indicate a problem condition

Name: VmMemPgFault
Description: Type of exception raised by computer hardware when a running program accesses a memory page that is not currently mapped by the memory management unit (MMU) into the virtual address space of a process

Name: VmMemSwapFree
Description: Free swap space in kilobytes (KB)

Name: VmMemSwapTotal
Description: Total swap space in kilobytes (KB)

Name: VmMemTotal
Description: Total amount of usable RAM in kilobytes (KB)

Name: VmNetBytesRecvd
Description: Total network bytes received across all interfaces (excluding loopback).

Name: VmNetBytesSent
Description: Total network bytes sent across all interfaces (excluding loopback).

Name: VmNetDropsRecvd
Description: Total network receive drops across all interfaces (excluding loopback).

Name: VmNetDropsSent
Description: Total network send drops across all interfaces (excluding loopback).

Name: VmNetErrorsRecvd
Description: Total network receive errors across all interfaces (excluding loopback).

Name: VmNetErrorsSent
Description: Total network send errors across all interfaces (excluding loopback).

Name: VmNetPacketsRecvd
Description: Total network packets received across all interfaces (excluding loopback).
